incidents.impact: Renewal-risk show suite could fail presentation-ready proof if LED schedule is not verified.
incidents.recommendedAction: Confirm access, verify LED schedule, replace weak pods and approve recovery proof.

incidents.impact: Clinic lounge wall may show yellowing if reservoir swing continues.
incidents.recommendedAction: Add reservoir check to care visit and confirm nutrient dose note is report-ready.

incidents.impact: Manual-check mode is required until gateway heartbeat recovers.
incidents.recommendedAction: Power-cycle gateway during clubhouse visit and keep proof photos as interim evidence.

incidents.impact: Monthly ESG pack cannot be exported cleanly until tomorrow's full-wall capture is complete.
incidents.recommendedAction: Track tomorrow's scheduled capture and verify ESG sign-off before report export.

rules.label: Critical incident
rules.rule: Critical or renewal-risk incidents must be resolved or explicitly owner-accepted before the client proof pack is exported.

rules.label: SLA clock
rules.rule: Due-today incidents stay in the executive queue until a resolution note is recorded.

rules.label: Evidence closeout
rules.rule: Closing an incident requires a linked work order, proof requirement or sensor acknowledgement.
